chapter_title.en: In response to the demand for avenging Uthman

parts.text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) بعد ما بويع بالخلافة وقد قال

text: له قوم من الصحابة: لو عاقبت قوماً ممن أجلب على عثمان؟ فقال:

en.sayed-ali-raza: After swearing of allegiance to Amīr al-mu’minīn, some people from among the companions of the Prophet said to him. “You should punish the people who assaulted ‘Uthmān,” whereupon he said:
